info.name: CAP — Civic Accountability Platform
info.description:
Full API collection for the Civic Accountability Platform. Import alongside CAP_Environment.json.

1. Set baseUrl in environment (default: http://localhost:5000)
2. Run 'Login (admin)' first — token is auto-saved to {{token}}
3. IDs are auto-saved after Create requests into environment variables

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Ministry of Finance",
  "code": "MOF",
  "budget": 120000000,
  "description": "Fiscal policy and national budget management",
  "headOfDept": "Dr. Nimal Silva"
}

{
  "name": "Green Energy Solutions Ltd.",
  "registrationNo": "REG-006",
  "email": "contact@greenenergy.lk",
  "phone": "+94-11-789-0123",
  "address": "55 Solar Avenue, Colombo 5",
  "category": "Energy"
}

{
  "contractNo": "CON-2025-011",
  "title": "Solar Panel Installation — Government Buildings",
  "description": "Installation of solar panels on 20 government buildings to reduce energy costs",
  "vendor": "{{vendorId}}",
  "department": "{{departmentId}}",
  "contractValue": 4500000,
  "startDate": "2025-04-01",
  "endDate": "2026-03-31",
  "procurementMethod": "open_tender",
  "status": "draft",
  "category": "Energy",
  "tags": ["solar", "renewable", "infrastructure"]
}

{
  "auditType": "routine",
  "contract": "{{contractId}}",
  "vendor": "{{vendorId}}",
  "startDate": "2025-05-01",
  "endDate": "2025-05-15",
  "summary": "Routine compliance check for CON-2025-011 solar panel installation contract",
  "recommendations": "Verify site completion certificates match invoiced milestones"
}

{
  "status": "completed",
  "riskRating": "low",
  "isCompliant": true,
  "endDate": "2025-05-15",
  "summary": "All deliverables verified. No issues found.",
  "recommendations": "Continue quarterly monitoring."
}

exec: console.log('📊 Audit risk recalculated to:', d.auditRisk.riskRating);

body.raw:
{
  "findingType": "fraud",
  "severity": "critical",
  "description": "Payment issued against a post-contract invoice with no contractual basis",
  "evidence": "Invoice dated after contract expiry. No change-order or addendum on file.",
  "recommendation": "Freeze vendor account. Refer to Anti-Corruption Commission."
}

exec: // First run 'Register New User' and copy the user _id into {{userId}}
console.log('✅ publicRecordId saved from first result:', d.data[0]._id);

body.raw:
{
  "authorName": "Concerned Citizen",
  "content": "I live near the highway project area. The construction is ahead of schedule and the road quality looks significantly improved compared to last year. However, some drainage channels near km marker 42 still seem incomplete. Can the Ministry confirm the completion date?",
  "authorEmail": "citizen@example.com",
  "isAnonymous": false,
  "isWhistleblower": false
}

request.description: Returns all currencies supported by the Frankfurter exchange-rate API (European Central Bank data). Results are cached server-side for 24 hours. Use the currency codes returned here as the `from` and `to` parameters in the Convert endpoint.

item.name: 💱 Convert Contract Value to Currency (no auth)

query.description: Target currency code (required). See GET /api/public/currencies for supported codes.
Source currency code (optional, defaults to USD).

request.description:
Fetches a public record and converts its contract value to the specified target currency using live exchange rates from the Frankfurter API (https://api.frankfurter.app).

Requires `publicRecordId` to be set — run 'Get Public Record' first to auto-save it.

Example currencies: EUR, GBP, JPY, AUD, CAD, CHF, INR, SGD

exec: // Login as viewer first, then run this request
